judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports are thorough and correct, hitting every expectation with strong evidence; they are comparable.

report_1.evidence: `main`. It's the trunk (`remotes/origin/HEAD -> origin/main`... the only other candidate — `feat/weighted-scorer`, the branch `feat/pairwise-metric` was literally built from — is disqualified

report_2.evidence: `main`. ... `feat/weighted-scorer` is a feature branch, not an integration branch, and (per Q2) its work has already landed in `main`, so it is not a valid target.

report_1.evidence: `feat/pairwise-metric`'s first unique commit, `7b2e100`... has parent `ac9d505` — exactly the tip of `feat/weighted-scorer`... So the branch was created from `feat/weighted-scorer`, not from `main`... `feat/weighted-scorer` is a **dead base** — a ref that still exists... but whose content has already landed on `main` through a different commit... squash-merged into `main` via a PR — its commits (W1–W3) were rewritten into a single new commit rather than preserved as ancestors.

report_2.evidence: **`feat/pairwise-metric` was branched from the tip of `feat/weighted-scorer`**, not from `main`... `feat/weighted-scorer` was already reviewed and squash-merged into `main` as PR #42. Its content is fully in `main`; it just isn't connected in `main`'s ancestry graph because squash-merge always produces a brand-new commit

report_1.evidence: `scoring/scorer.py`, the full +13/-3... — 100% from `feat/weighted-scorer` (W1+W2). Already on `main` verbatim... the remaining 16 insertions/3 deletions are stale carry-over from the `feat/weighted-scorer` dependency, present only because `feat/pairwise-metric` branched from it before PR #42 squash-merged it into `main`, and has never been rebased since

report_2.evidence: of the 21 lines a PR would currently display, only 5... are actually pairwise-metric work. The other 16 (all of `scorer.py`, and `overlap()` in `metrics.py`)... **This content is present only because `feat/pairwise-metric` branched off `feat/weighted-scorer` before the latter was squash-merged, and was never rebased afterward**

report_1.evidence: `git rebase --onto main feat/weighted-scorer feat/pairwise-metric`, or equivalently cherry-pick... After rebasing, confirm the fix worked... `git diff main..<branch>` should show exactly 2 files/5 insertions (grader.txt +1, metrics.py +4, nothing in scorer.py); `git log main..<branch> --oneline` should show exactly the 2 commits

report_2.evidence: **Rebase the branch onto current `main`... `git rebase --onto main feat/weighted-scorer feat/pairwise-metric`... **Re-verify the cleaned-up state**: `git log --oneline main..feat/pairwise-metric` should show only the 2 commits (X1, X2), and `git diff main...feat/pairwise-metric` should show only the 2-file/5-line diff.
